message:
feat: Implement packages/collections TODO stubs with real functionality

dict_impl.zig:
- hashKey: Call tp_hash slot if available, fallback to identity
- keysEqual: Call tp_richcompare with Py_EQ, check for NotImplemented
- releaseKey/releaseValue: Call tp_dealloc when refcnt reaches 0

tuple_impl.zig:
- releaseItem: Call tp_dealloc when refcnt reaches 0
- hashItem: Call tp_hash slot if available
- itemsEqual: Call tp_richcompare with Py_EQ

list_impl.zig:
- sort: Adaptive algorithm - insertion sort for <=16 items, quicksort for larger
- releaseItem: Call tp_dealloc when refcnt reaches 0

traceback_impl.zig:
- PyTraceback_Print: Walk traceback chain, extract frame/code info

All packages/collections TODOs eliminated (10 → 0).
